Home / Time Tracking / Kimai

Kimai — open source alternative

Self-hosted time tracker with invoicing and reports.

Strengths

  • Teams, projects, customers and invoices in one tool.
  • REST API plus mobile clients.
  • Easy PHP/MySQL deployment on any VPS.

Weaknesses

  • UI is functional rather than polished.
  • Some reports need the paid plugins or plugin-store extensions.
  • Smaller ecosystem of integrations than Toggl.
License: AGPL-3.0 Self-host difficulty: 2/5 Hosted cloud optionMobile: iOS, Android

Official site · Source on GitHub

Ad slot — OSS middle

Kimai is used as an alternative to

Toggl Track

Lightweight time tracker for freelancers and teams.

See all alternatives →

Harvest

Time tracking with invoicing built in.

See all alternatives →
